title: linaria verticillata subsp. anticaria
intro: Linaria verticillata subsp. anticaria, also known as Antirrhinum anticaria, is a subspecies of the toadflax plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from its alkaloid content. The health benefits of Linaria verticillata subsp. anticaria include the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential use in treating wounds and infections. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use is largely anecdotal and not widely studied or recommended by modern medicine.
